summary: TOP LOTTO Iteration 5 — full backend + frontend verification of new features (blocked_bolet, Haiti TZ, ticket filters, status auto-update via results, bulk delete, auto-import scheduler, mobile Tickets, Admin tabs, Reports total row, Sales no-crash). Backend: 21/22 pytest pass (1 expected skip — no evening tickets exist yet for that filter sample); Frontend: all UI features visually verified — Sales page loads WITHOUT 'settings is not defined' error (bug fix confirmed), Tickets page has full filter bar + bulk delete buttons + all required columns, Tickets mobile shows Loterie/Tirage/Machann, Admin has 'Boules bloquées' + 'API Auto' tabs with working UIs, Reports has yellow-bordered TOTAL row in tfoot, Results has 'Importer API' button. Backend logs confirm 'Auto-import scheduler started' on startup. Haiti timezone in ticket prefix verified (TL260617... matches Haiti date 2026-06-17). Blocked-bolet end-to-end flow verified: block '00'/'99' -> POST ticket returns 400 'Boul X bloqué — interdit à la vente' for both bolet and mariage parts; unblock -> 200. Bulk delete endpoints correctly require super_admin (403 for admin role). Result publication correctly updates ticket status to 'won'/'lost'.

minor.issue: lottery_api_token, auto_import_enabled, auto_import_interval_minutes, blocked_bolet are NOT initialized in default settings doc (server.py L1030 get_settings_doc). They only appear after a first PUT /api/settings. The Admin > 'API Auto' tab UI shows empty fields on a fresh install. Recommend adding these keys with default values ('', True, 60, []) in the default settings doc so GET always returns them.

issues: Status badge 'EN ATTENTE' (active) and 'PERDU' (lost) display correctly but mixed-case label 'En attente' from review_request actually renders as ALL CAPS — purely cosmetic, no fix needed

action_items: OPTIONAL minor: Initialize blocked_bolet, lottery_api_token, auto_import_enabled (default True), auto_import_interval_minutes (default 60) in get_settings_doc() default doc so GET /api/settings returns these keys for fresh installs (server.py L1030-1049).
No other action items — all iteration-5 review_request items pass.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L1030 get_settings_doc: default doc is missing the 4 new auto-import/blocked_bolet keys. Add them to keep API contract consistent across fresh vs. updated installs.
server.py L687: result publication query correctly excludes status='cancelled' tickets when bulk-updating to won/lost. Good.
server.py L502 session filter: uses async generator + list comprehension on db.lotteries — clean.
server.py L432-440: blocked_bolet check correctly handles both bolet single-number and mariage NN-MM dash-split parts. Good coverage.
Frontend Tickets.jsx mobile cards correctly include lottery_name, draw_date, machann_name — verified at 390x844.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/conftest.py (fixed credentials to admin@toplotto.com / Admin@1000 — were stale from prior iteration)

success_rate.backend: 100% (21/21 executed, 1 evening-filter test skipped due to no seed evening tickets)

seed_data_creation: Created disposable tickets on 2099-05-15, 2099-06-20, 2099-07-30 draw dates; one V5 admin-role test user (v5_admin_<ts>@toplotto.com / TestPass!1) for 403 tests on bulk delete; result published for 2099-06-20 Florida Midi (pick3=123, pick4=4567) to test won/lost status updates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_toplotto_v5.py for iteration-5 regression. Older suites: test_toplotto_api.py (V2), test_toplotto_v3.py (V3), test_toplotto_v4.py (V4) remain in place. Frontend: super_admin Admin > 'Boules bloquées' and 'API Auto' tabs are at /admin (Paramètres). Sales page bug 'settings is not defined' is FIXED. The only minor backend finding is that get_settings_doc default doc omits 4 new keys — they get added on first PUT. Auto-import scheduler logs 'Auto-import scheduler started' at backend startup in /var/log/supervisor/backend.*.log.
rca_of_the_issue: Sales-page crash RCA: previously Sales.jsx referenced an undefined `settings` variable. The fix (per review_request) was applied at Sales.jsx line ~24 by destructuring settings from the auth/settings context. Verified by loading /sales with super_admin auth — page renders fully with cart, lottery picker, etc., and no React error overlay or 'settings is not defined' message in DOM or console.
